## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt` has been run
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo test --all-features` passes
- [ ] New or changed public API is documented
- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)
